subject: Status review: labrador milestone in Rome | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-2493
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in Rome. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-2493. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: coordination, coffee.
